title: UFO Showdown: Pentagon Ordered to Surrender Secret 'Tic Tac' Files in Days
description: Lawmakers demand 46 secret UFO videos from the Pentagon by April 14, spotlighting Tic Tac craft and security threats near US bases in a escalating transparency battle. Representative Luna leads the charge amid Trump's disclosure push.

title: UFC Legend Georges St-Pierre Revisits Mysterious UFO Encounter That He ‘Cannot Explain’
description: Many years ago, former UFC champion Georges St-Pierre revealed that he once had a mysterious UFO encounter while traveling in New Mexico. He claimed that it happened when he was in a car with Rashad Evans, Mike van Arsdale, Ali Abdelaziz, and another fighter. Abdelaziz later corroborated the UFO story. title: UFO showdown as secret files on mystery objects at US bases must be surrendered in days
description: Lawmakers have set an April 14 deadline for the Pentagon to surrender 46 secret UFO videos as officials warn mysterious craft pose a major national security risk
